sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 2:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 2:1
items.html: This language is a “language of branches” that points to their upper roots, since “You haven’t even a single blade of grass below that has not a root above.” Therefore, the sages of Kabbalah have found themselves a ready language to imply through the branches and to teach about their upper roots. (Inner Light, page 1 and the beginning of Inner Observation, item 1)
